newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The NVIDIA MGX 800VDC collaboration (June 3, ceremony May 29), the 800V-to-6V GaNFast PDB at Computex (June 2-5), and the $250m S-3 shelf / earnout-share dilution risk were all already captured in the June 9 case. The -4.81% move since prev is a flow/dilution-driven flush, not new news.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: the NVIDIA-MGX halo and retail attention already killed the 'underfollowed' leg; +160% YTD leaves it not as mispriced as top residual names. No new news since June 9; today's flush partially resets crowding. Offsetting forces - hold.
verdicts.bull: GaN/SiC power in tight supply with direct NVIDIA 800V data-center pull.
verdicts.neutral: Exposure real but now well-followed via the NVIDIA halo.
verdicts.bear: +160% YTD and retail attention erased the under-owned premise; dilution overhang.

verdicts.rankRationale: MGX 800VDC and the 800V-to-6V GaNFast PDB modestly raised AI data-center power directness, but that was already credited June 9. No new node-criticality evidence since; dilution is a flow issue. Hold rank 35 on the node map.
verdicts.bull: GaN power-delivery directly enables 800V AI rack architecture, beyond generic analog/power.
verdicts.neutral: More direct than before but still downstream of HBM/packaging criticality.
verdicts.bear: Power optionality not yet at volume; dilution risk; less critical than memory/packaging nodes.

verdicts.rankRationale: Power/compound-semi optionality with no optical/cable/CPO-layer exposure; the June 4 earnout-share 8-K already materialized this page's stated dilution risk and triggered the June 9 down move. No new info since - the down call stands, hold at the lowered rank 63.
verdicts.bull: AI power-density optionality with NVIDIA pull.
verdicts.neutral: Off-thesis for a CPO list; power not optics.
verdicts.bear: No CPO/optical layer; dilution overhang; belongs low on an actionable CPO-alpha list.
